text: WarTranslated Peskov says the so-called SVO will continue after the Easter truce until Zelensky “finds the courage” to make peace with Russia. The Easter truce between Ukraine and Russia just started. It runs from 16:00 on April 11 to the end of April 12. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：佩斯科夫表示，所谓的“特别军事行动”将在复活节停火后继续，直到泽连斯基“找到勇气”与俄罗斯实现和平。乌克兰和俄罗斯之间的复活节停火刚刚开始，时间从4月11日16:00持续到4月12日结束。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Canada's PM says the era of 70% of Canada's defense spending going to the U.S. is over. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043266647192998020/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @VeryBrexitProbs : MAGA thinks Europe can't defend itself without America. Here's what they don't know. 1. France and Britain have 515 nuclear warheads and 8 nuclear missile submarines. 2. European defence spending hit €481 billion this year. That's more than Russia and China spend combined. The EU's ReArm Europe plan is mobilising another €800 billion. 3. European countries have over 1.7 million active troops. Russia has 1.3 million. 4. EU and UK air forces fly over 1,400 combat aircraft. Their navies have five aircraft carriers, over 60 submarines, more than 120 frigates and destroyers. 5. Europe has over 6,000 artillery pieces and that's before the biggest rearmament wave since the Cold War. Poland alone is adding 212 new howitzers. 6. The British SAS invented modern special forces. The US copied them to build Delta Force. From France's Foreign Legion to Poland's GROM, Europe's elite units are among the deadliest on earth. 7. Europe already has joint military commands ready to fight. The UK leads a 10-nation rapid reaction force across Northern Europe and the Arctic. Finland alone can mobilise 900,000 trained reservists all prepared to fight in arctic conditions. 8. Europe has its own satellite navigation (Galileo), its own defence programme (75 active projects) and is building its own rapid deployment force. The "helpless Europe" story was never about defence. It was about keeping Europe dependent and buying American weapons, relying on American intelligence, following American foreign policy. Thanks to Trump, that now ends. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix RT @VeryBrexitProbs：MAGA（让美国再次伟大）认为没有美国，欧洲就无法自卫。以下是他们所不知道的：1. 法国和英国拥有515枚核弹头和8艘核动力导弹潜艇。2. 今年欧洲国防开支达到4810亿欧元，超过了俄罗斯和中国的总和。欧盟的“重整欧洲”计划正在动员另外8000亿欧元。3. 欧洲国家拥有超过170万现役军人，俄罗斯有130万。4. 欧盟和英国空军拥有超过1400架作战飞机，海军拥有5艘航空母舰、60多艘潜艇、120多艘护卫舰和驱逐舰。5. 欧洲拥有超过6000门火炮，这还是在冷战以来最大规模的重整军备浪潮之前。仅波兰就增加了212门新榴弹炮。6. 英国SAS发明了现代特种部队，美国效仿他们建立了三角洲部队。从法国外籍军团到波兰GROM，欧洲的精锐部队是世界上最致命的部队之一。7. 欧洲已经拥有随时准备战斗的联合军事指挥部。英国领导着一支覆盖北欧和北极的10国快速反应部队。仅芬兰就能动员90万名受过训练的预备役人员，随时准备在北极条件下作战。8. 欧洲拥有自己的卫星导航系统（伽利略）、自己的国防计划（75个活跃项目），并正在建立自己的快速部署部队。“无助的欧洲”故事从来不是关于国防的，而是关于让欧洲保持依赖、购买美国武器、依赖美国情报、追随美国外交政策。多亏了特朗普，这一切现在结束了。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref: “From asserting authority in the Strait of Hormuz to pursuing reparations, we stand firm for the people's rights.” The Islamic regime appears unwilling to budge. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043264597742817439/photo/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix Diz-me com quem andas e diremos quem és. Amanhã, a Hungria vai a votos 🇭🇺 @PM_ViktorOrban Orbán volta a ir a jogo… e os resultados falam por si 💪 Uma das taxas de natalidade mais altas da União Europeia, vários anos acima de 1,5 filhos por mulher 📊 Crescimento económico com ambição acima da média europeia 📈 Nada disto é por acaso. É o resultado de políticas que colocam o país, as famílias e a soberania em primeiro lugar ✋ Amanhã, os húngaros decidem. E a Europa devia prestar atenção. Mais soberania, menos submissão 🔥 #Hungria #Eleições #Orbán #Soberania #Europa #Portugal #Chega 🇵🇹 - Pedro dos Santos Frazão tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：物以类聚，人以群分。明天，匈牙利将进行投票 🇭🇺 @PM_ViktorOrban 欧尔班再次出战……结果不言而喻 💪 欧盟最高的出生率之一，连续多年保持在每名女性生育1.5个孩子以上 📊 经济增长雄心高于欧洲平均水平 📈 这绝非偶然，这是将国家、家庭和主权放在首位的政策结果 ✋ 明天，匈牙利人将做出决定，欧洲应该关注。更多主权，更少屈从 🔥 #匈牙利 #选举 #欧尔班 #主权 #欧洲 #葡萄牙 #Chega 🇵🇹 - Pedro dos Santos Frazão 推文

text: WarTranslated Swedish Coast Guard detained the Panama-flagged bulk carrier Hui Yuan near Ystad after aircraft spotted it dumping coal waste, SVT reports. It was en route from Ust-Luga to Las Palmas and is now anchored off Sweden. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043262809354445178/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：据SVT报道，瑞典海岸警卫队在伊斯塔德（Ystad）附近扣留了巴拿马籍散货船“辉源”号（Hui Yuan），此前有飞机发现其倾倒煤炭废料。该船原定从乌斯季卢加（Ust-Luga）前往拉斯帕尔马斯，目前停泊在瑞典近海。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043262809354445178/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @AdamKinzinger : "The Lego videos are funny. The situation is not. A theocracy that blocks its own people's access to the internet is currently running circles around the United States in the information space of an active conflict. That does not happen by accident. It happens because one side prepared and the other side burned down its own capacity and called it a victory for free speech." (Link in reply) tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @AdamKinzinger：“乐高视频很有趣，但局势并不有趣。一个阻止本国人民访问互联网的神权国家，目前在活跃冲突的信息空间中绕着美国转。这绝非偶然，这是因为一方做好了准备，而另一方烧毁了自己的能力，并称之为言论自由的胜利。”（回复中附链接） 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has decided to delay his trip to the United Nations and the United States in order to continue managing the government’s work from Beirut amid the current internal situation. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV: Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has postponed his U.S. visit after internal advice warned of a potential trap involving an alleged secret meeting with an Israeli envoy. He may face pressure to meet Israeli representatives, risking domestic backlash. The visit has not been cancelled. Lebanese officials confirmed that Lebanon has separated its issue from Iran’s in preliminary talks with the U.S. and Israel, insisting on a ceasefire before negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆（Nawaf Salam）决定推迟前往联合国和美国的行程，以便在当前内部局势下继续从贝鲁特管理政府工作。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV：黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆在内部建议警告可能存在涉及与以色列特使秘密会面的陷阱后，推迟了美国之行。他可能面临会见以色列代表的压力，从而冒着国内反弹的风险。访问并未取消。黎巴嫩官员证实，黎巴嫩在与美国和以色列的初步会谈中已将其问题与伊朗问题分开，坚持在谈判前实现停火。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 US‑Iran talks in Islamabad ended without a breakthrough after nine hours. Iran presented reasonable initiatives but excessive U.S. demands prevented a framework, Per Tasnim. The Key obstacles: Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. refused to include Lebanon in any deal with Iran, wanting to hand the issue entirely to Israel. On Hormuz, Washington sought to open it now without a future Iranian role. Iran insists no change to the strait’s status unless a reasonable agreement is reached. The U.S. proposed that enriched uranium be removed from Iranian soil – a red line for Tehran. Another round may take place within 7‑10 days with a different U.S. delegation level, Per Al-Araby Al-Jadeed. Israel believes the ceasefire may be extended to allow continued contacts, Per Kan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，美伊在伊斯兰堡的会谈进行了九个小时后结束，未取得突破。伊朗提出了合理的倡议，但美国过分的要求阻碍了框架的达成。关键障碍：黎巴嫩和霍尔木兹海峡。美国拒绝将黎巴嫩纳入与伊朗的任何协议，希望将该问题完全交给以色列。关于霍尔木兹海峡，华盛顿寻求立即开放海峡，而不让伊朗在未来发挥作用。伊朗坚持除非达成合理协议，否则海峡地位不变。美国提议将浓缩铀从伊朗领土移走——这对德黑兰来说是一条红线。据《阿拉伯人报》（Al-Araby Al-Jadeed）报道，另一轮会谈可能会在7-10天内以不同的美国代表团级别进行。据Kan报道，以色列认为停火可能会延长以允许继续接触。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🛢️ Saudi Arabia has restored the East–West oil pipeline and the Manifa field to full operation. ▪️ The facilities are now functioning normally again. ▪️ Earlier attacks had reduced production at the Manifa field by 300,000 barrels per day and cut pipeline transport by 700,000 barrels per day. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🛢️ 沙特阿拉伯已恢复东西向输油管道和曼尼法（Manifa）油田的全面运营。▪️ 这些设施目前已恢复正常运作。▪️ 此前的袭击导致曼尼法油田的产量每天减少30万桶，管道运输量每天减少70万桶。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: “Before the negotiations, I emphasized that we have the necessary good faith and will, but due to the experiences of the two previous wars, we have no trust in the opposing side. My colleagues on the Iranian delegation Minaab168 raised forward-looking initiatives, but the opposing side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：“在谈判之前，我强调我们有必要的诚意和意愿，但由于前两次战争的经验，我们对对方没有信任。伊朗代表团的同事们提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终没能在本轮谈判中赢得伊朗代表团的信任。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : This is the best upsum I’ve read, although I confess to being biased given the authorship. Key line: “The new norm involves periodic precision strikes against Iran, deployed not for the purpose of regime change but for containment. Tehran, in turn, will be forced to internalize a posture of resistance it has spent decades exporting and leading from the rear.” The end of American restraint broke a quarter-century taboo & shattered Iran's doctrine of exporting its wars. Once that happened, any US policy shifts stopped being the determining factor of where the Third Gulf War takes the region. With @KamranBokhari https://newlinesmag.com/essays/the-third-gulf-war-and-its-aftermath/ - Hassan I. Hassan tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss：这是我读过的最好的总结，尽管我承认由于作者身份，我可能有偏见。关键句：“新的常态涉及针对伊朗的定期精确打击，部署的目的不是为了政权更迭，而是为了遏制。德黑兰反过来将被迫内化一种它几十年来一直在出口和从后方领导的抵抗姿态。”美国克制的结束打破了四分之一个世纪的禁忌，粉碎了伊朗输出战争的学说。一旦发生这种情况，任何美国政策的转变都不再是第三次海湾战争将把该地区带向何方的决定性因素。与 @KamranBokhari 合作 https://newlinesmag.com/essays/the-third-gulf-war-and-its-aftermath/ - Hassan I. Hassan 推文

See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043257979449806963/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says troops dismantled an explosives lab in Tulkarem, seizing materials for lEDs including hundreds of pipe bombs and over 50 kg of explosives. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043256268236697937/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军称，部队在图勒凯尔姆（Tulkarem）拆除了一个爆炸物实验室，查获了用于简易爆炸装置（IED）的材料，包括数百枚管状炸弹和超过50公斤的炸药。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043256268236697937/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : I had this thought today. What the world witnessed between the U.S. and Israel against Iran was one of the largest coordinated air campaigns ever launched against a single nation-state by two allied powers. Few operations, if any, in the modern era compare. In the first 72 hours alone, over 1,700 targets were struck. By day seven, the U.S. had hit more than 3,000. By day ten, 5,000. The final U.S. tally: over 13,000 targets. More than 2,000 command and control sites. 1,500 air defense positions. 450 ballistic missile targets. 600 naval targets. Israel matched that tempo on its own terms. In 18 days, the Israeli Air Force flew what it normally flies in a full year. More than 12,000 munitions dropped. 8,500 strikes across Iran. 5,700 combat sorties in the Iranian theater alone. 7,000 targets struck across all fronts of operation. Before Iran could respond meaningfully, Israel had destroyed 80 to 85 percent of Iran’s air defense architecture. Radars. Interceptors. Detection systems. Gone. Iran was producing roughly 100 ballistic missiles per month before the war. That capacity is now close to zero. The first 24 hours were double the firepower of the opening of the 2003 Iraq War. Desert Storm opened with 150 targets. Epic Fury opened with 1,700. The most sustained joint air campaign of the 21st century. By two countries. Footage from CENTCOM compiled by @Osinttechnical tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：RT @Osint613：我今天有这样一个想法。世界目睹的美国和以色列针对伊朗的行动，是两个盟国针对单一民族国家发起的规模最大的协调空袭行动之一。现代史上几乎没有行动可以与之相比。仅在前72小时内，就有超过1700个目标被击中。到第七天，美国击中了超过3000个目标。到第十天，达到5000个。美国最终统计：超过13000个目标。超过2000个指挥和控制点。1500个防空阵地。450个弹道导弹目标。600个海军目标。以色列以自己的方式匹配了这一节奏。在18天内，以色列空军飞行的架次相当于其通常一整年的飞行量。投下了超过12000枚弹药。在伊朗境内进行了8500次打击。仅在伊朗战区就进行了5700次战斗飞行。在所有作战前线击中了7000个目标。在伊朗做出有意义的回应之前，以色列已经摧毁了伊朗80%到85%的防空架构。雷达、拦截器、探测系统。全部消失。伊朗在战争前每月生产约100枚弹道导弹。这一能力现在几乎为零。前24小时的火力是2003年伊拉克战争开局的两倍。“沙漠风暴”行动以150个目标开局。“史诗愤怒”（Epic Fury）行动以1700个目标开局。这是21世纪最持续的联合空袭行动。由两个国家完成。来自中央司令部的镜头由 @Osinttechnical 汇编 推文

text: 📸 Türkiye's ASELSAN announces that mass production and delivery of homegrown LGK-82 laser guidance kits is ongoing after completing factory acceptance tests. The kit is designed for high-precision strikes against fixed and moving targets with reduced collateral damage.
text_zh: 📸 土耳其ASELSAN宣布，在完成工厂验收测试后，国产LGK-82激光制导套件的批量生产和交付正在进行中。该套件旨在对固定和移动目标进行高精度打击，并减少附带损害。

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Zionist occupiers are deliberately intensifying the humanitarian crisis in Gaza by extensively restricting the entry of aid, including flour, which has led to a continuous increase in bread prices amid severe poverty in Gaza. - Hamas
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 犹太复国主义占领者正在通过广泛限制包括面粉在内的援助物资进入，蓄意加剧加沙的人道主义危机，这导致在加沙极端贫困的情况下，面包价格持续上涨。 - 哈马斯

text: Iran's Ghalibaf on failed negotiations with the U.S. in Pakistan: We have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experience of two previous wars, we do not trust the other side. The other side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations America has understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for it to decide whether it can earn our trust or not. We consider ‘power diplomacy’ another method alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫关于与美国在巴基斯坦谈判失败的声明：我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于前两次战争的经验，我们不信任对方。对方最终没能在本轮谈判中赢得伊朗代表团的信任。美国已经理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是时候让它决定是否能赢得我们的信任了。我们认为“权力外交”是与军事斗争并列的另一种确保伊朗民族权利的方法。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said that after 21 hours of intense talks in Islamabad, the U.S. failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. “America understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for them to decide whether they can earn our trust,” he stated. Ghalibaf noted that Iran had good faith and will, but due to the experience of two previous wars, there is no trust in the US. He described “diplomacy of power” as another path alongside military struggle to secure Iran’s rights. He thanked Pakistan for facilitating the talks and praised the Iranian people for their support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的紧张会谈后，美国未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。“美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是时候让他们决定是否能赢得我们的信任了，”他表示。卡利巴夫指出，伊朗有诚意和意愿，但由于前两次战争的经验，对美国没有信任。他将“权力外交”描述为与军事斗争并列的另一条确保伊朗权利的道路。他感谢巴基斯坦为会谈提供便利，并赞扬伊朗人民的支持。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran explains why Strait of Hormuz naval blockade won’t solve 'self-made problem'.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗解释为什么霍尔木兹海峡海军封锁不能解决“自造问题”。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 Iran's Parliament Speaker Qalibaf: — US failed to earn Iran’s trust despite Iran’s goodwill and constructive proposals during the latest round of talks. — Iran entered the negotiations with serious intent, but past experiences from previous wars left…"
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：——尽管伊朗在最新一轮会谈中表现出善意并提出了建设性建议，但美国未能赢得伊朗的信任。——伊朗带着严肃的意图参加了谈判，但过去战争的经验让……”

text: WarFront Witness pinned « From the WFW team, we wish all those celebrating a peaceful and blessed Orthodox Easter 🐣 , may this day bring you hope, renewal, and a sense of unity wherever you are. @wfwitness »
text_zh: WarFront Witness置顶：“来自WFW团队，我们祝愿所有庆祝东正教复活节的人们和平与祝福 🐣，愿这一天无论你在哪里，都能带给你希望、更新和团结感。 @wfwitness”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "From the WFW team, we wish all those celebrating a peaceful and blessed Easter 🐣. May this day bring you warmth, hope, and a quiet sense of renewal, wherever you are. @wfwitness" From the WFW team, we wish all those celebrating a peaceful and blessed Orthodox Easter 🐣 , may this day bring you hope, renewal, and a sense of unity wherever you are. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“来自WFW团队，我们祝愿所有庆祝复活节的人们和平与祝福 🐣。愿这一天无论你在哪里，都能带给你温暖、希望和一种安静的更新感。 @wfwitness” 来自WFW团队，我们祝愿所有庆祝东正教复活节的人们和平与祝福 🐣，愿这一天无论你在哪里，都能带给你希望、更新和团结感。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's Parliament Speaker Qalibaf: — US failed to earn Iran’s trust despite Iran’s goodwill and constructive proposals during the latest round of talks. — Iran entered the negotiations with serious intent, but past experiences from previous wars left Tehran skeptical. — Iran’s delegation presented forward-looking initiatives, yet the other side ultimately could not build confidence. — The US now understands Iran’s principles and must decide whether it can gain Iran’s trust. — Iran views “power diplomacy” as a key tool alongside military resistance to secure the nation’s rights, and will not stop working to consolidate the achievements of its 40 days of national defense. — Grateful to 'friendly and brotherly' Pakistan for hosting. — Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank all the heroic people of Iran who, following the advice of the Supreme Leader and by being present in the streets, supported their children and accompanied us with their prayers, and I say well done to my colleagues in these intense 21-hour negotiations. Long live and prosper dear Iran!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：——尽管伊朗在最新一轮会谈中表现出善意并提出了建设性建议，但美国未能赢得伊朗的信任。——伊朗带着严肃的意图参加了谈判，但过去战争的经验让德黑兰持怀疑态度。——伊朗代表团提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终没能建立信任。——美国现在理解了伊朗的原则，必须决定是否能赢得伊朗的信任。——伊朗将“权力外交”视为与军事抵抗并列的确保国家权利的关键工具，并将继续努力巩固其40天国防成就。——感谢“友好和兄弟般的”巴基斯坦主办此次会谈。——伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的整体。我感谢所有英雄般的伊朗人民，他们遵循最高领袖的建议，通过走上街头支持他们的孩子，并用祈祷陪伴我们，我也对我在这些紧张的21小时谈判中的同事们表示赞赏。亲爱的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 US-Iran joint control of Strait of Hormuz — Pakistan plan. Pakistan diplomatic source to Al Jazeera.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 美伊共同控制霍尔木兹海峡——巴基斯坦计划。巴基斯坦外交消息人士向半岛电视台透露。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump stated that he is considering the possibility of a naval blockade of Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普表示，他正在考虑对伊朗实施海军封锁的可能性。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 “Americans need this agreement more than we do” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi exclusively to RT “If they don’t accept our terms, we’ll go our own way — nothing will change”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “美国人比我们更需要这份协议”——伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ebrahim Azizi）独家向RT表示：“如果他们不接受我们的条件，我们将走自己的路——什么都不会改变”

text: 🇮🇷 RT exclusive: “All vessels entering the Strait of Hormuz must pay tolls under a new control system” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi “Government must establish full management and control of the Strait based on national interests”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 RT独家：“所有进入霍尔木兹海峡的船只必须根据新的控制系统支付通行费”——伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹：“政府必须根据国家利益建立对海峡的全面管理和控制”

text: 🇮🇷 “We simply do not trust the Americans” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi to RT “How can a nation built on arrogance and colonialism respect others or honor its agreements?”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我们根本不信任美国人”——伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹向RT表示：“一个建立在傲慢和殖民主义基础上的国家，怎么可能尊重他人或遵守其协议？”

text: 🇮🇷 Current status of ships in the Strait of Hormuz after the end of Islamabad negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊斯兰堡谈判结束后，霍尔木兹海峡船只的当前状态。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及以色列北部对抗线周边地区无人机警报响起。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Ukraine will open the "Druzhba" oil pipeline immediately after the elections in Hungary, Orban believes. "We will win the elections and the next morning, the Ukrainians will open it," he told RIA Novosti. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 欧尔班认为，乌克兰将在匈牙利选举后立即开放“友谊”输油管道。“我们将赢得选举，第二天早上，乌克兰人就会开放它，”他告诉俄新社。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Kyiv says Russia committed 2,299 violations of the Easter ceasefire, while Moscow claims Ukraine violated it 1,971 times.
text_zh: 基辅称俄罗斯违反了复活节停火协议2299次，而莫斯科声称乌克兰违反了1971次。

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 At least 30 people died in a stampede at Haiti’s Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot after a gathering promoted on TikTok, which drew a large crowd including school-age children as young as 12. Heavy rain reportedly triggered panic during the event. Officials say most of the victims died from asphyxiation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 在TikTok上宣传的一次聚会吸引了包括12岁学龄儿童在内的大量人群后，海地米洛（Milot）的拉费里埃城堡（Citadelle Laferrière）发生踩踏事件，造成至少30人死亡。据报道，大雨在活动期间引发了恐慌。官员称大多数受害者死于窒息。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's state television broadcast said that the United States' "demanding too much" was an obstacle to reaching an agreement. The report said the major sticking points were the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's rights to enrich uranium, and "other issues." "Despite various creative approaches by the Iranian team, the Americans' overreach and unreasonable demands prevented talks from advancing," the state television report said
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗国家电视台广播称，美国“要求过多”是达成协议的障碍。报道称，主要症结在于霍尔木兹海峡的开放、伊朗浓缩铀的权利以及“其他问题”。“尽管伊朗团队采取了各种创造性的方法，但美国人的越权和不合理要求阻碍了会谈的进展，”国家电视台报道称

text: Reporter: Precisely, what have they rejected here? JD Vance: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 记者：他们在这里究竟拒绝了什么？JD·万斯：我们需要看到他们做出肯定的承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求使他们能够迅速获得核武器的工具。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Bloomberg: Two oil tankers have turned back in the Strait of Hormuz following the failure of US-Iranian talks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 彭博社：在美伊会谈失败后，两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: The days of our military sending 70 cents of every dollar to the United States are over.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼：我们军队将每一美元中的70美分送往美国的时代已经结束。

text: JD Vance: Whatever shortcomings the negotiations had, it wasn’t because of the Pakistanis, who did an amazing job and sincerely tried to help us and the Iranians bridge the gap and reach a deal.
text_zh: JD·万斯：无论谈判有什么缺点，那都不是因为巴基斯坦人，他们做得非常出色，并真诚地试图帮助我们和伊朗人弥合分歧并达成协议。

text: JD Vance: We’ve had a number of substantive discussions with the Iranians. That’s the good news. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement — and I think that’s bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我们与伊朗人进行了多次实质性讨论。这是好消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议——我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更坏的消息。

text: Trump attended a UFC event in Florida while talks with Iran collapsed in Pakistan.
text_zh: 特朗普在佛罗里达州参加UFC比赛，而与伊朗的谈判在巴基斯坦破裂。

text: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Pakistani Foreign Minister: We hope that both the American and Iranian sides will continue to adhere to the ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 巴基斯坦外交部长：我们希望美伊双方都能继续遵守停火协议。
